name: o9 Solutions AI Supply Chain Platform API
what_it_does: o9 Solutions AI Supply Chain Platform REST API for integrated business planning (IBP), demand sensing, and supply chain optimization. Enables AI agents to manage integrated demand, supply, and financial planning for executive S&OP/IBP workflow automation, handle AI-driven demand sensing and short-cycle forecasting for real-time supply chain responsiveness, access supply network design and scenario modeling for strategic supply chain optimization, retrieve market intelligence and external signal integration for outside-in demand planning, manage end-to-end supply chain visibility and digital twin simulation for risk management, handle production planning and capacity optimization for manufacturing supply chain, access commercial and revenue planning integration for commercial-supply chain alignment, retrieve sustainability and carbon footprint tracking for supply chain ESG reporting, manage supplier collaboration and supply chain control tower for end-to-end orchestration, and integrate o9 with SAP, Oracle, and ERP systems for unified planning data.
use_cases: Automating S&OP planning from executive planning agents
Sensing demand signals from supply chain intelligence agents
Simulating supply scenarios from risk management agents
Reporting supply chain ESG from sustainability agents
not_for: Small companies without enterprise supply chain complexity
Operational-only systems without integrated planning requirements
Organizations without data science capability for AI model management
best_when: A Global 1000 company using o9 Solutions wants AI agents to automate integrated demand/supply/financial planning, demand sensing, supply chain scenario analysis, and S&OP workflow management.
avoid_when: AI PLANNING RISK: o9 AI supply chain models require significant historical data and tuning — automated planning decisions based on poorly calibrated models create supply chain disruption. S&OP is a consensus process; automated AI planning recommendations must support, not replace, human S&OP consensus and executive sign-off. SAP/ERP integration complexity — o9 requires deep integration with ERP master data (MDM); automated planning with incorrect master data creates cascading planning errors across the supply chain.

auth.notes: o9 Solutions uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. API access via o9 enterprise partnership. Dallas, Texas HQ. Founded 2009 by Chakri Gottemukkala and Sanjiv Sidhu (i2 Technologies founders). Private (KKR-backed). $3.7B valuation (2022). 200+ Global 1000 enterprise customers. AI-powered supply chain planning leader. Competes with Kinaxis, Blue Yonder, and SAP IBP for integrated business planning.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; module and user-based pricing
pricing.notes: Dallas, TX. Founded 2009. KKR-backed. $3.7B valuation. 200+ Global 1000 customers. AI supply chain planning leader. Competes with Kinaxis and SAP IBP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per enterprise integration

known_agent_gotchas: AI MODEL CALIBRATION RISK: o9 AI demand and supply planning models require significant historical data and careful tuning; automated planning decisions from poorly calibrated models create supply chain disruption at enterprise scale
S&OP human consensus requirement — integrated business planning is a human consensus process; automated AI planning recommendations must support, not replace, S&OP executive consensus and sign-off

ERP master data dependency — o9 planning depends on accurate ERP master data (item, BOM, routing, customer); automated planning with incorrect ERP master data creates cascading planning errors across all planning modules
Demand sensing real-time data freshness — o9 demand sensing requires fresh POS and market signal data; data pipeline latency affects short-cycle forecast accuracy

Supply chain digital twin complexity — automated scenario modeling must understand physical supply chain constraints (capacity, lead time, transportation) accurately; simplified constraint modeling creates infeasible plans

Multi-tier supplier visibility — o9 supply chain visibility requires supplier data sharing agreements; automated supplier collaboration requires legal and commercial agreements with tier 1 and tier 2 suppliers
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise supply chain planning. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Supply chain and planning data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supply chain planning. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Supply chain and planning data.
